releasedToday.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedToday.highlight: 未完成的流行实验，叛逆与脆弱并存
releasedToday.highlightEn: Unfinished pop experiments, rebellion meets vulnerability
releasedToday.summary: Lil Nas X 以未完成专辑《DREAMBOY》回归，延续其标志性的流行与嘻哈融合风格，歌词大胆直白，充满自我探索与情感冲突。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Lil Nas X returns with the unfinished album 'DREAMBOY,' blending pop and hip-hop with bold lyrics of self-exploration and emotional conflict.

releasedToday.title: KL7
releasedToday.highlight: Kendrick Lamar 的暗黑叙事回归
releasedToday.summary: 《KL7》延续 Kendrick 对种族、身份与社会的深度剖析，制作上融合实验性节拍与交响元素，是年度最受期待的嘻哈专辑之一。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'KL7' continues Kendrick’s deep dive into race, identity, and society, with experimental beats and orchestral elements, making it one of the year’s most anticipated hip-hop albums.

releasedToday.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedToday.highlight: Don McLean 1975 年现场录音重现
releasedToday.summary: 《Living Free (Live Manchester '75)》捕捉了 Don McLean 巅峰时期的现场魅力，经典曲目与即兴演绎交织，适合民谣与老摇滚爱好者。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'Living Free (Live Manchester '75)' captures Don McLean at his peak, blending classic hits with improvisation, perfect for folk and classic rock fans.

releasedToday.title: The Power Station
releasedToday.highlight: 80年代超级乐队同名专辑再版
releasedToday.summary: The Power Station 的同名专辑是80年代舞曲摇滚的经典，融合放克与硬摇滚，此次再版让新老乐迷重温Robert Palmer等人的辉煌。
releasedToday.summaryEn: The Power Station's self-titled album is a dance-rock classic from the 80s, blending funk and hard rock; this reissue lets fans revisit the glory of Robert Palmer and co.

releasedToday.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedToday.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 2025 现场录音
releasedToday.summary: 《Warehouse 2026》收录了Dave Matthews Band在里士满的完整现场，即兴演奏与乐队默契令人沉醉，是乐迷收藏必备。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'Warehouse 2026' captures a full DMB show in Richmond, with improvisation and band chemistry that make it a must-have for fans.

releasedToday.title: Euphoria
releasedToday.summary: 德国电子大师 Schiller 新作《Euphoria》延续其标志性的氛围与旋律，空灵人声与渐进节拍交织，适合沉浸式聆听。
releasedToday.summaryEn: German electronic maestro Schiller's 'Euphoria' continues his signature blend of atmosphere and melody, with ethereal vocals and progressive beats for immersive listening.

releasedToday.title: Melodrama
releasedToday.summary: 德国流行歌手 LINA 的《Melodrama》以强劲的电子流行节奏和直白歌词，探讨爱情与失落，制作精良且充满能量。
releasedToday.summaryEn: German pop singer LINA's 'Melodrama' delivers powerful electro-pop beats and candid lyrics about love and loss, with polished production and high energy.

releasedToday.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedToday.highlight: Robin Trower 美国现场精选
releasedToday.summary: 《One Moment in Time: Live in the USA》收录了 Robin Trower 在美巡演中的高光时刻，吉他独奏与蓝调摇滚氛围浓郁。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'One Moment in Time: Live in the USA' captures Robin Trower’s US tour highlights, with blistering guitar solos and a rich blues-rock atmosphere.

releasedThisWeek.artist: Manaka Kataoka, Yasuaki Iwata, Hajime Wakai
